description: Inconsistent population flag — a subject has ITTFL=Y (in ITT population) but is excluded from all analysis datasets. This logical inconsistency should be detected by the agent.

sap_context.note: Subject XYZ-001-002 has ITTFL='Y' but no ADTTE record (missing from analysis)

expected_output.expected_behavior: Should detect inconsistency: subject flagged for ITT but missing from ADTTE
